metadata.title: Synaply - Dyondza Silo na AI na ku Phindha-phindha loku Engeteleleke
metadata.description: Engetela vutshila bya wena bya ririmi hi ku phindha-phindha loku engeteleleke loku fambisiwaka hi AI. Tumbuluxa nxaxamelo wa marito ya wena n’wini kumbe u dyondza eka minxaxamelo ya vanhu hinkwavo leyi avelanaka.
metadata.keywords: dyondza Xinghezi, ku phindha-phindha loku engeteleleke, muaki wa vuswikoti bya marito, tiflexikhadi, AI ku dyondza ririmi, minxaxamelo ya marito, apu yo dyondza ririmi, dyondza Xipaniya, dyondza Xifrench, dyondza Xigerman, vuswikoti bya ririmi, hlayisa marito eka mianakanyo, ku dyondza hi SRS
metadata.og_title: Synaply - Ku Dyondza Marito hi Vutlhari
metadata.og_description: Engetela vutshila bya wena bya ririmi hi ku phindha-phindha loku engeteleleke loku fambisiwaka hi AI. Dyondza hi ku tsutsuma, u tsundzuka nkarhi wo leha.
metadata.og_image_alt: Xirhangana xa Apu yo Dyondza Ririmi ya Synaply AI
metadata.twitter_title: Synaply - Dyondza Marito Lamantshwa Handle ko Tikarhata
metadata.twitter_description: Nghena eka Synaply leswaku u ndlandlamuxa vutshila bya wena bya marito hi ku tirhisa ku phindha-phindha loku engeteleleke loku tlhariheke na AI.

common.title: Nhlokomhaka
common.offline_mode: Ndlela ya ku nga ri eka Inthanete

dashboard.title: Dashibodo
dashboard.subtitle: Ku dyondza {target} ku suka eka {source}
dashboard.community_lists_desc: Lavisisa minxaxamelo ya marito ya vanhu hinkwavo na ti-playlist leti humaka eka vutirhisi van’wana.
dashboard.ai_practice_desc: Antswisa vutshila bya wena bya marito hi ku hundzuluxa swivulwa leswi endliweke hi AI leswi sekeriweke eka nhlokomhaka yihi na yihi kumbe nxaxamelo wa marito ya wena.
dashboard.manage_words_desc: Vona, lavisisa, lulamisa kumbe u sula marito eka nhlengeletano ya wena.
dashboard.import_success: Marito ya nghenisiwile hi ku humelela!
dashboard.import_error_retry: A hi swi kotanga ku hlayisa rito ra wena lerintshwa. A hi ringeteni nakambe!
dashboard.add_word_success: Rito ri engeteriwile hi ku humelela!
dashboard.generate_word_list_error: Ku tsandzekile ku endla nxaxamelo wa marito.
dashboard.select_topic_error: Ndzi kombela u hlawula nhlokomhaka kumbe u nghenisa mongo wa wena n’wini.
dashboard.word_placeholder: Rito leri faneleke ku hundzuluxiwa (xikombiso: apple)
dashboard.ai_translation_notice: AI yi ta pfuna hi nhlamuselo na xikombiso xa xivulwa
dashboard.auto_translate: Hundzuluxa nsimu leyi nga riki na nchumu hi yoxe
dashboard.delete_confirm: Xana u tiyisile leswaku u lava ku sula rito leri?
dashboard.delete_all_confirm: Xana u tiyisile leswaku u lava ku sula marito ya wena HINKWAWO? Xiendlo lexi a xi nge tlherisiwi endzhaku.
dashboard.no_words_found: Ku hava marito lama kumekaka. Ringeta rito rin’wana ro lavisisa kumbe u engetela marito man’wana!
dashboard.no_words_for_lesson: Ku hava marito lama kumekeke yo dyondza. Ndzi kombela u rhanga hi ku engetela marito lamantshwa eka nxaxamelo wa wena!
dashboard.no_words_to_review: U hava marito yo ma pfuxeta namuntlha. Tlhela u vuya endzhakunyana kumbe u engetela marito lamantshwa!
dashboard.lesson_complete_desc: Ntirho lowunene! U pfuxetile marito ya wena ya namuntlha.
dashboard.practice_setup_title: Ndzulamiso wa AI wa ku Engetela Vutshila
dashboard.practice_setup_desc: Nghenisa nhlokomhaka leswaku u endla swivulwa swa vuleteri leswi tolovelekeke swa wena n’wini!
dashboard.practice_topic_hint: Ku ri siya ri nga ri na nchumu swi ta endla swivulwa leswi sekeriweke eka marito ya wena.
dashboard.footer_help_text: Hi pfune ku antswisa! Avelana makungu ya wena, vika swihoxo, kumbe u kombela swilo leswi engeteleleke:
dashboard.support_desc: Loko u tsakela apu leyi, u nga seketela nhluvuko wa yona.

onboarding.journey_begins: Riendzo ra wena ra ku va n’wini wa ririmi ri sungula laha.
onboarding.strategy_desc: Leswaku u kuma leswinene eka Synaply, hi ku khutaza tindlela leti to olova:
onboarding.step1_desc: Engetela kwalomu ka 100 wa marito lama fambelanaka na nhlokomhaka yin’we (xikombiso, Mabindzu kumbe Riendzo) leswaku u aka mongo lowu tiyeke.
onboarding.step2_title: Ku pfuxeta ka Siku na Siku
onboarding.step2_desc: Vandza marito lawa hi ku phindha-phindha siku na siku ku fikela loko ya va xiphemu xa marito ya wena.
onboarding.step3_desc: Cinca u ya eka AI ku Engetela Vutshila leswaku u tirhisa marito ya wena lamantshwa eka swivulwa leswi heleleke na swiyimo swa xiviri swa misava.
onboarding.got_it: Ndzi swi kumile, a hi sunguleni!

dashboard.generate_ai_title: Endla Nxaxamelo wa Marito hi AI
dashboard.custom_topic_label: Nhlokomhaka ya wena n'wini kumbe mongo (hi ku n'watseka)
dashboard.custom_topic_placeholder: xikombiso: Marito ya nhlangano wa mabindzu mayelana na ku xavisa
dashboard.publish_desc: Avelana nhlengeletano leyi ya {count} wa marito na vutirhisi van’wana. Yi ta vonaka eka galari ya Minxaxamelo ya Mani na Mani.
dashboard.list_title_placeholder: xikombiso: Marito ya Nkoka ya IT
dashboard.list_desc_placeholder: Nxaxamelo lowu wu vulavula hi yini?
dashboard.publish_success: Nxaxamelo wa marito wu hangalaseriwile hi ku humelela!
dashboard.publish_error: Ku tsandzekile ku hangalasa nxaxamelo wa marito.
dashboard.inline_add_error: Ndzi kombela u nyika rito ro sungula na vuhundzuluxi hinkwaswo
dashboard.save_batch_success: Swi humelerile ku hlayisa {count} wa marito eka nxaxamelo wa wena!
dashboard.save_batch_error: Ku tsandzekile ku hlayisa marito. Ndzi kombela u ringeta nakambe.
dashboard.no_words_to_save: Ku hava marito yo ma hlayisa
dashboard.remove_duplicates_error: Ndzi kombela u sula marito lama phindhiweke emahlweni ko hlayisa.
dashboard.remove_duplicates_publish_error: Ndzi kombela u sula marito lama phindhiweke emahlweni ko hangalasa.

topics.home: Kaya na Vutomi bya Siku na Siku

ai_word_info.error_coffee_break: AI yi le ku nweni ka kofinyana. Ndzi kombela u ringeta nakambe endzhaku ka nkarhinyana!
ai_word_info.error_generic: Yo! A hi swi kotanga ku kuma vutivi bya AI. A hi ringeteni nakambe!

public_lists.title: Minxaxamelo ya Marito ya Mani na Mani
public_lists.subtitle: Lavisisa minxaxamelo ya marito leyi endliweke hi vutirhisi van’wana eka tindzimi ta wena.
public_lists.search_placeholder: Lavisisa minxaxamelo hi nhlokomhaka kumbe nhlamuselo...
public_lists.no_lists_desc: Ringeta ku lavisisa kun’wana kumbe u cinca filthara ya wena ya ririmi.
public_lists.load_error: A hi swi kotanga ku hlayisa minxaxamelo ya mani na mani sweswi.
public_lists.playlists_no_lists: Ku hava minxaxamelo ya mani na mani leyi kumekaka

detail.title: Vuxokoxoko bya Nxaxamelo
detail.added_success: Marito ya engeteriwile hi ku humelela eka nhlengeletano ya wena!
detail.added_error: Ku tsandzekile ku engetela marito eka nhlengeletano ya wena.
detail.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this public list? This action cannot be undone.
detail.delete_success: Nxaxamelo wu suriwile hi ku humelela!
detail.duplicate_error: Ku na marito lama phindhiweke eka nxaxamelo. Ndzi kombela u ma sula emahlweni ko hlayisa.

profile.terms_welcome: Wamukelekile eka Synaply. Hi ku tirhisa mitirho ya hina, u pfumelelana na milawu leyi...
profile.title: Ndzulamiso wa Phurofayili
profile.leave_empty: Siya swi nga ri na nchumu leswaku u hlayisa phasiwedi ya sweswi
profile.update_success: Phurofayili yi antswisiwile hi ku humelela!
profile.subtitle: Lawula mahungu ya wena na ndzulamiso wa ririmi

register.title: Tumbuluxa akhawunti ya wena
register.password_hint: Yi fanele ku va na swihlawulekisi swa 8 kumbe ku tlula

best_practice.title: Vuleteri lebyinene bya ku humelela
best_practice.strategy_desc: Leswaku u kuma vutivi lebyi humelelaka ngopfu bya ku dyondza, hi ku khutaza tindlela leti ta 3 to olova:
best_practice.step1_desc: Engetela kwalomu ka 100 wa marito u veka mianakanyo eka nhlokomhaka yin’we (xikombiso, Riendzo kumbe Mabindzu) leswaku u tumbuluxa mongo.
best_practice.step2_desc: Vandza marito lawa hi ku phindha-phindha siku na siku ku fikela loko ya va xiphemu xa marito ya wena.
best_practice.step3_desc: Cinca u ya eka AI ku Engetela Vutshila leswaku u tirhisa marito ya wena lamantshwa eka swivulwa leswi heleleke na mingo ya xiviri ya misava.

getting_started.title: Ku sungula
getting_started.desc: Synaply i xitirhisiwa xa matimba lexi endleriweke ku ku pfuna ku ndlandlamuxa marito ya wena na ku antswisa vutshila bya wena bya ririmi hi ku tirhisa ku phindha-phindha loku engeteleleke na vutlhari bya rito.
getting_started.step1_desc: Engetela marito hi mavoko kumbe u tirhisa AI leswaku u endla minxaxamelo hi tinhlokomhaka na min'wangulo.
getting_started.step2_title: Goba ra 2: Vuleteri bya Siku na Siku
getting_started.step2_desc: Tirhisa ku Pfuxeta Marito leswaku u hlayisa marito eka mianakanyo u tirhisa algorithm ya FSRS.

manual.title: Ku nghenisa hi Mavoko
manual.desc: Nghenisa rito eka ririmi leri u ri dyondzaka na vuhundzuluxi bya rona. U nga engetela nhlamuselo kumbe mongo leswaku u hlayisa eka mianakanyo ku antswa.

auto_translate.title: Hundzuluxa hi yoxe
auto_translate.desc: Tirhisa xihlawulekisi xa "Hundzuluxa hi yoxe" leswaku u hundzuluxa hi ku tsopeta ka tihlo hi ku tirhisa ntirho wa DeepL.

ai_list.title: Ku Endla Nxaxamelo (Nxaxamelo wa Marito ya AI)
ai_list.desc: Hlawula n'wangulo (A1-C2) na nhlokomhaka, naswona AI (Gemini) yi ta hlengeletana nxaxamelo wa marito lama fambelanaka na wena, lawa ya nga engeteriwaka eka xihlamusalamarito xa wena hi ku tlanya rini n’we.

ai_insights.title: Vutivi bya AI
ai_insights.desc: Eka rito rin’wana na rin’wana, AI yi nga nyika masinonimi, swikombiso swa matirhiselo, na switsundzuxo swa girama.

spaced_repetition.title: Ku Phindha-phindha loku Engeteleleke
spaced_repetition.desc: Synaply yi tirhisa algorithm ya FSRS (Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler) leswaku yi hlayela nkarhi lowu faneleke wo phindha rito rin’wana na rin’wana.
spaced_repetition.step1: U kombiwa rito eka ririmi ro sungula.
spaced_repetition.step2: Nghenisa vuhundzuluxi u tlanya Enter kumbe Kambela N'wangulo.
spaced_repetition.step3: Loko u nga tsundzuki — tlanya "A ndzi tsundzuki" leswaku u vona n'wangulo.
spaced_repetition.step4: Algorithm yi ta tlhela yi hlayela siku leri landzelaka ro pfuxeta leri sekeriweke eka nhlamulo ya wena.

ai_practice.title: AI ku Engetela Vutshila: Ku Hundzuluxa Swivulwa
ai_practice.desc: Xihlawulekisi lexi xi pfuna ku letela girama na mongo hi ku hundzuluxa swivulwa hinkwaswo leswi tsaleriweke wena hi AI.
ai_practice.how_it_works: Ndlela leyi swi tirhaka ha yona:
ai_practice.step1: Hlawula nhlokomhaka (xikombiso, "Mabindzu", "Riendzo") kumbe u siya nsimu yi ri hava.
ai_practice.step2: AI yi ta endla swivulwa swa 5 eka nhlokomhaka leyi hlawuriweke.
ai_practice.step3: Rhuma vuhundzuluxi bya wena u tlhela u kuma mbuyelo lowu nga na vuxokoxoko.
ai_practice.step4: AI yi ta kombetela swihoxo yi tlhela yi ringanyeta vuhundzuluxi lebyi faneleke na tinhlamuselo.

dictionary_management.title: Vufambisi bya Xihlamusalamarito
dictionary_management.search: Lavisisa: Tirhisa bara yo lavisisa leswaku u kuma marito hi ku tsutsuma eka nhlengeletano ya wena.
dictionary_management.sorting: Ku lulamisa: Vona nxaxamelo wa marito ya wena hinkwawo hi ku hlawula ku ma sula.
dictionary_management.delete_all: Sula marito hinkwawo: Vuswikoti bya ku sula xihlamusalamarito xa wena hinkwaswo hi ku tlanya rini n’we.

progress.title: Nhluvuko na Tinhla
progress.desc: Ntsengo wa wena (eka nhlokomhaka ya apu) wu kombisa ntsengo wa marito lama hundzuluxiweke hi ku faneleka. Loko ntsengo wu ri ehenhla, swi vula leswaku u ma tiva marito yo tala!
